# MyPeptidePrice.com

MyPeptidePrice.com is an independent research peptide price comparison and tracking tool.

## What it is
A research peptide price tracker that displays current pricing for 300+ baseline product listings across tracked vendors, with live API feeds used where available. The site does not sell products, make recommendations, or rank vendors. It displays pricing data only.

## What data it shows
- Product name and listing name
- Vendor name and website
- Listed price (before discount)
- Discount percentage available with code SAMMYC
- In-stock status
- Product category (GLP / Weight Loss, Recovery & Healing, Longevity & Anti-Aging, Cognitive & Nootropic, Growth Hormone, Sexual Health & Tanning, Metabolic & Energy, Capsules, Supplies)

## How often it updates
Prices are manually verified and updated every week.

## Vendor eligibility
Vendors must publish third-party Certificates of Analysis (COAs) covering all 7 of the following testing categories to be listed: Net Purity, Net Content, Heavy Metals, Endotoxins, Identification, Sterility, Conformity.

## Main pages
- https://mypeptideprice.com/, Full price comparison table with search and filters
- https://mypeptideprice.com/vendors.html, Vendor directory with discount codes
- https://mypeptideprice.com/faq.html, FAQ, testing standards, affiliate disclosure
- https://mypeptideprice.com/glp-weight-loss.html, GLP-1 and weight loss peptide prices

## Affiliate disclosure
This site earns affiliate commissions when users click through to vendors. All products are for laboratory research purposes only and are not intended for human consumption.
